passives.name: Recovery
passives.effects: Gain {{as|10 '''bonus''' mana regeneration}}. Manaless champions gain {{as|15 '''bonus''' health regeneration}} instead.

effects_structured.raw: Manaless champions gain {{as 15 '''bonus''' health regeneration}} instead.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Recovery routes to mana regeneration for mana-resource champions and to health regeneration for manaless champions.
Mode-scoped behavior: Arena map-difference notes report alternate stat package (AP/ability-haste/health) and are encoded under mode_overrides.ARENA for deferred runtime consumption.
Verification note: page notes mention a possible tooltip/behavior inconsistency around mana-user health restoration; this is tracked as informational until canonical confirmation.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
